title: Stormchasing
description: This Modpack adds Tornados and mods useful for Stormchasing and Roleplay.
body:
❗This Project is currently paused and wont receive updates until August 2026❗

This modpack is designed for immersive storm‑chasing gameplay and atmospheric roleplay.
It uses protomanly’s Weather Mod to generate realistic storms, tornadoes, and dynamic weather events.

⚠️Warning:  
This project is currently in alpha. It may be unstable, contain bugs, or behave unpredictably. Use at your own risk.

Usage
Suitable for private worlds, community‑based servers, and modpacks.

Please be aware of the risks associated with early‑stage development.
